_comment: Golden SHA-256 artifact digests, produced by the canonical TypeScript reference serializer (sdk/typescript/src/context.ts: serializeArtifact + computeArtifactDigest) over artifacts.json. These are the cross-SDK parity anchor: the Python serializer MUST reproduce them byte-for-byte. Regeneration recipe is documented in test_parity.py and the sdk-parity skill. Go/Rust serializer arms can additively assert against these same digests.
